Internal Legal & Compliance Memo — Sakura Digital Holdings Co., Ltd. (TSE Prime) — Board Confidential; To: Mr. Hiroshi Kato, Chair; From: General Counsel; Contact: legal@sdh.co.jp
This memo addresses APPI/My Number obligations and FIEA MNPI controls for the proposed公開買付け (TOB) to acquire Kumori Crypto Trust KK; issuer is Sakura Digital Holdings Co., Ltd., Tokyo.
Unannounced TOB price JPY 1,280 per share and tentative tender-offer window 8/15–9/12 are undisclosed enumerated material facts under FIEA and JPX/TSE listing regulations; do not circulate outside the clean team.
Establish information barriers and refresh the insider list: add Ms. Ayaka Morimoto-san (IR), Mr. Daichi Ogawa-san (CISO), and GreenWave Advisory KK secondees; limit access per “wall-crossing” procedure.
Preliminary cyber incident summary: anomalous testnet bridge withdrawals observed; no customer assets impacted, but SakuraChain‑Custody v2.1 signing keys were touched; this remains non-public pending JFSA consultation.
Crypto/DPT commercial terms under negotiation: 3.2% management fee, 20 bps climate-impact rebate on ESG‑linked staking; details have not been shared outside the clean team or external counsel.
ESG/climate diligence: Hokkaido data-center Scope 2 reduction plan and draft sustainability-linked bond term sheet with step-up coupon below 85% renewables are MNPI until disclosed; rating pre-notes are embargoed.
APPI/My Number controls: do not collect or transmit My Number for due diligence beyond payroll; HR extract contains PII—MN: 8 8 1 2‑xx xx‑0 9 7 4 (obfuscated), EmpID: S D H‑0 1 9 7 A, personal email: ayaka.m@sdh‑staff.jp—store only in restricted folders.
Implement a blackout window for employee trading in Sakura Digital Holdings securities until the TOB is publicly announced; prohibit tipping and selective disclosure per JFSA guidance and internal code.
Marketing may continue educational webinars on crypto custody and ESG scoring using generic case studies; avoid issuer-specific metrics, deal codenames, or references to the TOB price or window.
Based on current review, no material adverse change has occurred, and risk commentary relies on public-source references (e.g., JPX/TSE handbooks and FSA notices); confidential data are excluded.
ops note: insider‑list export tool and wallet tracker will be tested with dummy addresses on a private testnet; this is operational QA only and not a disclosure event.
For queries contact legal@sdh.co.jp or visit http://intranet.sdh.jp/deals/tob?id=ZX‑ 12 34 9; external transmission is prohibited; compliance hotline tel:+81‑3‑5555‑1937.
Clean‑team roster v0.4—A. Morimoto, D. Ogawa, K. Sato; info‑barrier badge codes: i b‑ 4 7 , i b‑ 5 9 ; draft minutes archived at \\fileserver\dealroom\KCT\boa rd\m emo.docx
